{"input":[{"role":"developer","content":"{"id":"thread-context","type":"separator","value":"Current thread conversation:"}"},{"role":"assistant","content":"Log this message."}],"model":"openai/gpt-oss-120b","instructions":"You are Looping AI, a Slack app that helps teams achieve their goals and coordinate work within a workspace or organization. Your Slack username is @looping. You are NOT ChatGPT, OpenAI, or any other named AI product — you are Looping AI. Never refer to yourself by any other name or suggest users search for or invite any app other than @looping.

All interactions happen through Slack. Every request you receive has been submitted by a user inside a Slack workspace — via a channel message, a direct message, or a thread. Tailor your responses accordingly: be concise, use Slack-compatible formatting (mrkdwn), and assume the user is reading your reply inside Slack. Do not reference other interfaces or assume the user is interacting through a web app, API, or any other channel.

If you don't know or can't perform a task, explicitly acknowledge that you lack the information or capability required to complete a task or provide an answer.

Stay focused on the user's request. Provide helpful, actionable responses.

You are an organizational admin assistant. Your expertise covers workspace strategy, goal-setting, value streams, objectives, metrics, and team coordination. Help users manage and improve their organization.","tools":[{"type":"function","name":"echo","description":"Echoes back the input message. Useful for testing.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"The message to echo back"}},"required":["message"]}},{"type":"function","name":"web_search","description":"Performs a web search using the OpenRouter web search plugin. Returns AI-analyzed search results. IMPORTANT: Include ALL relevant context from the conversation in the 'query' parameter, as the search operates independently without access to conversation history.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"The search query with full context. Include all relevant background information, constraints, and preferences since the search tool doesn't have access to the conversation history."}},"required":["query"]}},{"type":"function","name":"dispatch_workflow","description":"Dispatches a workflow to the execution engine for administrative operations. Use this when the user requests workspace management, agent management, channel configuration, event management, or session policy changes. The engine will execute the operations using its own tools and report the results. For most operations, pass an empty permits array. Only include permits for sensitive operations: 'deleteWorkspace' (requires workspace ID) or 'setAdminChannel' (requires channel ID).","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"workflowId":{"type":"string","description":"The workflow ID to execute. Use 'admin-v1' for administrative operations."},"permits":{"type":"array","description":"Optional permits for sensitive operations. Empty array for standard operations.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["deleteWorkspace","setAdminChannel"],"description":"The permit type."},"workspaceId":{"type":"number","description":"Required for deleteWorkspace: the workspace ID to delete."},"channelId":{"type":"string","description":"Required for setAdminChannel: the Slack channel ID to set as admin channel."}},"required":["type"]}}},"required":["workflowId"]}}],"store":false,"stream":false,"reasoning":{"effort":"high","summary":"auto"}}

response.body: {"id":"gen-1776794056-vO5cIY56iakLMXdkGttZ","object":"response","created_at":1776794056,"model":"openai/gpt-oss-120b","status":"completed","completed_at":1776794070,"output":[{"id":"rs_tmp_g1q1dexwg7s","type":"reasoning","status":"completed","content":[{"type":"reasoning_text","text":"We have a conversation: The instructions say: You are Looping AI Slack app. The user request is \"Log this message.\" We need to understand what \"Log this message.\" means. The user possibly wants to log a message within workspace? The toolset Python? There is a function dispatch_workflow to perform admin tasks. However logging a message probably needs to store it somewhere? There's no explicit knowledge about logging or functionality to log messages. The instruction says \"If you don't know or can't perform a task, explicitly acknowledge that you lack the information or capability required to complete a task or provide an answer.\" There's also \"Echoes back the input message.\" The user says \"Log this message.\" Probably they want to store the message as? They might be wanting a record of the message. Might be common functionality to log a message for audit or a message log. Since the system doesn't define a logging capability, we need to respond that we cannot log it directly. I could ask the user for more details: what do they want to do with log? Or we could use echo to echo back? But \"log\" means record. Could be they'd like to create a note. Possibly they'd like to add note in the workspace. If we had a note-taking mechanism or a channel dedicated to logs. Could ask them.\n\nBefore that, what does \"log\" refer to? The instructions for the bot: it's a Slack app that helps teams achieve goals, coordinate work. It can manage tasks, create goals, track metrics, etc. There's no built-in logging. It doesn't have a function to store arbitrary notes. There's dispatch_workflow which can do admin tasks. But not logging. There's a web search tool, not needed.\n\nThus we need to respond that we cannot log the message because we lack capability. Or ask clarification.\n\nThus the answer: \"I’m not sure what you’d like me to do with the message. Could you clarify where you’d like it logged (e.g., channel, note, etc.)?\" Something like that.\n\nBut the instruction: \"If you don't know or can't perform a task, explicitly acknowledge that you lack the information or capability required to complete a task or provide an answer.\" So I'd say: \"I don’t have a logging feature. Could you provide more details?\" That acknowledges.\n\nThus final answer: a short, Slack-formatted response.\n\nWe'll also need to ensure respecting instruction: no reference to ChatGPT etc; refer as @looping, but it's okay.\n\nThus final answer: expressive, ask for clarification."}],"summary":[],"format":"unknown"},{"id":"msg_tmp_0e333idch75b","type":"message","role":"assistant","status":"completed","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"I don’t have a built‑in way to log arbitrary messages.
